rationale: Competing CTAs split attention and lower conversion
check: Count primary buttons above the fold; should be 1

rationale: Visitors decide to stay in seconds based on the first screen
check: Is the core promise readable above the fold

rationale: Small targets cause mis-taps and frustration on touch
check: Measure interactive element sizes on mobile

rationale: WCAG AA minimum for normal text legibility
check: Run contrast check on body text vs background

rule: Visible focus indicator on all interactive elements
rationale: Keyboard users must see where focus is
check: Tab through the page and confirm visible focus

rule: Every image has meaningful or empty alt
rationale: Screen readers and image SEO depend on alt text
check: Audit img alt attributes

rationale: Catching errors early reduces abandonment
check: Trigger an invalid field and confirm inline feedback

rationale: Each extra field reduces completion rate
check: Count required fields; remove any non-essential

rationale: Structure aids both SEO and screen-reader navigation
check: Check there is exactly one h1 and ordered headings

rule: Page reflects intent in first 3 seconds
rationale: Mismatch between ad/search intent and page kills trust
check: Does the headline match the likely entry query

rationale: Proof reduces risk perception at the decision moment
check: Are testimonials/guarantees near the CTA

rationale: A spacing system creates visual rhythm and polish
check: Are margins/paddings from a defined scale

rationale: Too many fonts looks unprofessional and slows load
check: Count distinct font families

rationale: Motion can trigger vestibular discomfort
check: Enable reduced-motion and confirm animations reduce

rationale: Immediate feedback feels responsive
check: Interact and confirm visible state change is instant

rule: Error messages are specific and actionable
rationale: Vague errors leave users stuck
check: Trigger errors and read the messages

rationale: Consistent nav lowers cognitive load
check: Is nav in the same place across pages

rule: Mobile menu is reachable with one thumb
rationale: Thumb-zone reachability affects usability
check: Is the menu toggle in the lower/upper-reachable zone

rationale: LCP is a Core Web Vital and affects ranking + UX
check: Measure Largest Contentful Paint

rationale: Layout shift causes mis-clicks and feels broken
check: Measure CLS; reserve space for media

rationale: INP measures real responsiveness to input
check: Measure INP under interaction

rule: Images sized and lazy-loaded below fold
rationale: Right-sizing and lazy loading cut payload
check: Check srcset/sizes and loading=lazy

rationale: Over-long lines hurt reading comprehension
check: Measure characters per line in body copy

rule: Sufficient white space around key elements
rationale: Whitespace directs attention and signals quality
check: Is the primary CTA given breathing room

rationale: Lets keyboard users bypass repeated nav
check: Tab from top and confirm a skip link

rationale: Semantics drive assistive tech and SEO
check: Inspect for nav/main/header/footer/section

rationale: Descriptive links help SEO and screen readers
check: Avoid click-here; use meaningful anchor text

rationale: Prevents accidental irreversible loss
check: Does delete/remove ask for confirmation

rationale: Dark themes often fail contrast if unchecked
check: Run contrast checks in dark mode

rule: Single clear next step on thank-you pages
rationale: Post-conversion momentum increases LTV
check: Is there one logical next action after convert

rule: Sticky CTA on long mobile pages
rationale: Keeps the action reachable during long scroll
check: Is a persistent CTA present on mobile

rationale: Empty screens should teach the next action
check: Check empty states for guidance not blanks
